who: procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10-50 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10-50 vendor contracts/month, inconsistent vendor performance causes late deliveries and quality issues. We provide a vendor performance dashboard instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Inconsistent vendor performance leading to late deliveries and quality issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
